name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/week tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/week, policy violations cause cash flow gaps. We monitor expense claims instead of manual review of expense claims.
problem_solved: Monitoring employee expense claims for policy compliance
